//: Fabler x402 Tools MCP server — stdio transport, speaks directly to https://x402.fablerlabs.com. Add this block to your MCP client config (Claude Code: .mcp.json at your project root; Claude Desktop: claude_desktop_config.json). X402_BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY is YOUR OWN wallet key, used only to auto-pay 402 challenges — never Fabler Labs'. Omit it entirely to get the raw 402 challenge back instead and pay it through your own rails.
